title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das, co-founder of Yutori, argues that most AI agents are unreliable despite high per-step accuracy because errors compound across multi-step workflows. He contends that the agent industry has normalized this unreliability and advocates for building agents that work reliably on the first attempt, emphasizing taste and proof of work over raw performance.
